text:
There once was a small furry creature called Cupcake.

Every day Cupcombe woke up ecstatic.

Oh! Cupояoove.

She dreamed adventure!

That night she dreamed.

About secret kingdoms filled with fair maidens...

And dragons.

Which awakened...

At dawn...

As if life weren't strange enough...

They flew.

She didn't notice.

Until gravity took its course.

Oooh...

They weren’t dragons.

They weren’t fair maidens.

They weren’t secret anything.

Just kittens.

Oh.

Couch...

Maybe?

It wasn't just.

It wasn’t just.

It wasn't anything.

It was.

Just.

Maybe.

Fairy?

A fairy?

You couldn’t tell.

Maybe

There aren’t any fairies either.

Sometimes everything

Just happens.

Sometimes...

You walk into a ball.

There aren't any.

We talk.

We talk.

They say ballads.

About knights saving princesses.

About eagles grabbing falcons.

Not about owls.

Not even
